name: School dashboard
description: Application developed with the aim of studying Java and how to create an API using the language. This application implements CRUD functionalities, including secure authentication for users.

name: Start page
description: This is a simple browser start page written in svelte, capable of basic customization.

name: Agenda app
description: An application developed to study Next.js, capable of managing a MongoDB database with user authentication. It features an interface that enables users to to manage their contacts.

name: Cardapio app
description: Python application developed using the Flask framework. Its primary function is to create and manage PostgreSQL tables.
